title: lotodes azureum
intro: Lotodes azureum, also known as the Azure Water-plantain or Blue Water-plantain, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Haloragaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lotodes azureum include treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and infections, as well as reducing fever and alleviating pain. Herbal preparations of Lotodes azureum can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in water to create a tea, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
